description: This pipeline is designed to track spots in image data, utilizing a simplified tracking algorithm that groups incoming data based on annotations and allows for gap closing based on distance and time conditions, resulting in non-branching tracks.

68ff1280-125c-4773-b128-b56229bbf0d2.name: trackmate-tracking
68ff1280-125c-4773-b128-b56229bbf0d2.description:
Track spots using TrackMate

This algorithm groups the incoming data based on the annotations. Those groups can consist of one data item per slot.

25f0c000-a85b-4d8c-a228-0e29b905d935.name: trackmate-create-spot-tracker-simple-sparse-lap-tracker
25f0c000-a85b-4d8c-a228-0e29b905d935.description:
This tracker is identical to the sparse LAP tracker present in this trackmate, except that it
proposes fewer tuning options. Namely, only gap closing is allowed, based solely on
a distance and time condition. Track splitting and merging are not allowed, resulting
in having non-branching tracks.
